description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a metallic top assembly featuring a black handle and a safety pin. The body is made of metal and is encircled at the base by a thick black rubber or plastic bumper for impact protection. A flexible black hose with a green nozzle is attached near the top, curving downward and secured to the side of the cylinder. The front displays a prominent red and white label with instructions and safety information, while the back is mostly plain with some additional white text. The extinguisher is designed for portability and rapid deployment in emergency situations, commonly found in urban environments such as garages, hallways, and public buildings.
description: A red metal fire extinguisher with a black handle, safety pin, flexible hose, and instructional label on the front. It features a protective black base and is designed for emergency use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red label with white text, the black handle, safety pin, and the attached hose with a green nozzle.
description_view_1: Rear angled view displaying the plain red cylinder, the black base, and some white instructional text on the back.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the smooth red body, the black base, and the full length of the attached hose curving along the side.
description_view_3: Back view showing the hose running vertically along the cylinder and the absence of major labels or markings.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large red and white instructional label is present on the front of the cylinder, with additional smaller white text on the back.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black flexible hose with a green nozzle is attached near the top, curving downward and secured to the side.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top, inserted through the handle assembly.
